Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.AnnotationInfo

Packages that use AnnotationInfo
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
Bean-modeling layer for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
Lightweight bean lookup, contribution, and injection support for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect
Comprehensive reflection utilities for working with classes, methods, fields, constructors, and annotations in a more convenient and type-safe way than the standard Java reflection APIs.
org.apache.juneau.http.remote
Remote REST API
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs
JCS (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema
JSON-Schema Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
Parser API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
Serializer API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap
SOAP/XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API

  • Uses of AnnotationInfo in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean that return types with arguments of type AnnotationInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<AnnotationInfo>
    BeanPropertyMeta.getAnnotations()
    Returns all annotations on this property (field, getter, and setter).
    <A extends Annotation>
    Stream<AnnotationInfo<A>>
    BeanPropertyMeta.getAnnotations(Class<A> a)
    Returns a stream of annotations of the specified type on this property.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean with parameters of type AnnotationInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BeanInfo<?>
    BeanTypeResolver.resolveType(AnnotationInfo<BeanProp> lastBeanProp, ClassInfo type, TypeVariables typeVarImpls)
    Resolves the bean-property type-info for a property given its (optional) @BeanProp annotation and Java type.

  • Uses of AnnotationInfo in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject with parameters of type AnnotationInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static boolean
    JsrSupport.isInjectAnnotation(AnnotationInfo<?> annotation)
    Returns true if the annotation is an inject marker.
    static boolean
    JsrSupport.isNamedAnnotation(AnnotationInfo<?> annotation)
    Returns true if the annotation is a named qualifier.
    static boolean
    JsrSupport.isPostConstructAnnotation(AnnotationInfo<?> annotation)
    Returns true if the annotation is a post-construct lifecycle marker.
    static boolean
    JsrSupport.isPreDestroyAnnotation(AnnotationInfo<?> annotation)
    Returns true if the annotation is a pre-destroy lifecycle marker.
    static boolean
    JsrSupport.isQualifierMeta(AnnotationInfo<?> annotation)
    Returns true if this annotation type itself is annotated with a qualifier marker.
    static boolean
    JsrSupport.isSingletonAnnotation(AnnotationInfo<?> annotation)
    Returns true if the annotation is a singleton marker.
    static boolean
    JsrSupport.isValidAnnotation(AnnotationInfo<?> annotation)
    Returns true if the annotation is a Jakarta Bean Validation opt-in marker.
    static boolean
    JsrSupport.isValueAnnotation(AnnotationInfo<?> annotation)
    Returns true if the annotation is a config-value marker.
    static String
    JsrSupport.qualifierValue(AnnotationInfo<?> annotation)
    Reads qualifier value from an annotation when supported.
    static String
    JsrSupport.valueExpression(AnnotationInfo<?> annotation)
    Returns the configuration expression carried by a @Value annotation, or null if the annotation is not a recognized @Value.
    Method parameters in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject with type arguments of type AnnotationInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    ValueResolver.checkInjectConflict(List<? extends AnnotationInfo<?>> annotations, String siteDescription)
    Throws BeanCreationException if an injection site carries both @Value and an @Inject/@Autowired marker.
    static String
    ValueResolver.findValueExpression(List<? extends AnnotationInfo<?>> annotations)
    Returns the value() expression carried by the first @Value annotation in the list, or null if no @Value (Juneau or Spring) is present.
    static boolean
    ValueResolver.hasValueAnnotation(List<? extends AnnotationInfo<?>> annotations)
    Returns true if any annotation in the list is a @Value marker.

  • Uses of AnnotationInfo in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect that return AnnotationInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected <A extends Annotation>
    AnnotationInfo<A>
    ElementInfo.ai(Annotatable on, A value)
     
    <A extends Annotation>
    AnnotationInfo<A>
    AnnotationInfo.cast(Class<A> type)
    Casts this annotation info to a specific annotation type.
    static <A extends Annotation>
    AnnotationInfo<A>
    AnnotationInfo.of(Annotatable on, A value)
    Creates a new annotation info object.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect that return types with arguments of type AnnotationInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <A extends Annotation>
    List<AnnotationInfo<A>>
    AnnotationProvider.find(Class<A> type, ClassInfo c, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Finds annotations from a class using configurable traversal options.
    <A extends Annotation>
    List<AnnotationInfo<A>>
    AnnotationProvider.find(Class<A> type, ConstructorInfo c, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Finds annotations from a constructor using configurable traversal options.
    <A extends Annotation>
    List<AnnotationInfo<A>>
    AnnotationProvider.find(Class<A> type, FieldInfo f, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Finds annotations from a field using configurable traversal options.
    <A extends Annotation>
    List<AnnotationInfo<A>>
    AnnotationProvider.find(Class<A> type, MethodInfo m, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Finds annotations from a method using configurable traversal options.
    <A extends Annotation>
    List<AnnotationInfo<A>>
    AnnotationProvider.find(Class<A> type, ParameterInfo p, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Finds annotations from a parameter using configurable traversal options in child-to-parent order.
    List<AnnotationInfo<? extends Annotation>>
    AnnotationProvider.find(ClassInfo c, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Finds all annotations from a class using configurable traversal options, without filtering by annotation type.
    List<AnnotationInfo<? extends Annotation>>
    AnnotationProvider.find(ConstructorInfo c, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Finds all annotations from a constructor using configurable traversal options, without filtering by annotation type.
    List<AnnotationInfo<? extends Annotation>>
    AnnotationProvider.find(FieldInfo f, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Finds all annotations from a field using configurable traversal options, without filtering by annotation type.
    List<AnnotationInfo<? extends Annotation>>
    AnnotationProvider.find(MethodInfo m, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Finds all annotations from a method using configurable traversal options, without filtering by annotation type.
    List<AnnotationInfo<? extends Annotation>>
    AnnotationProvider.find(ParameterInfo p, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Finds all annotations from a parameter using configurable traversal options, without filtering by annotation type.
    List<AnnotationInfo<? extends Annotation>>
    ClassInfo.getAnnotations()
    Returns all annotations on this class and parent classes/interfaces in child-to-parent order.
    <A extends Annotation>
    Stream<AnnotationInfo<A>>
    ClassInfo.getAnnotations(Class<A> type)
    Returns all annotations of the specified type on this class and parent classes/interfaces in child-to-parent order.
    List<AnnotationInfo<Annotation>>
    FieldInfo.getAnnotations()
    Returns all annotations declared on this field.
    <A extends Annotation>
    Stream<AnnotationInfo<A>>
    FieldInfo.getAnnotations(Class<A> type)
    Returns all annotations of the specified type declared on this field.
    List<AnnotationInfo<Annotation>>
    MethodInfo.getAnnotations()
    Returns all annotations on this method and parent overridden methods in child-to-parent order.
    <A extends Annotation>
    Stream<AnnotationInfo<A>>
    MethodInfo.getAnnotations(Class<A> type)
    Returns all annotations of the specified type on this method and parent overridden methods in child-to-parent order.
    List<AnnotationInfo<Annotation>>
    PackageInfo.getAnnotations()
    Returns all annotations on this package, wrapped in AnnotationInfo objects.
    <A extends Annotation>
    Stream<AnnotationInfo<A>>
    PackageInfo.getAnnotations(Class<A> type)
    Returns this package's annotations of the specified type (including repeated annotations), wrapped in AnnotationInfo.
    List<AnnotationInfo<Annotation>>
    ParameterInfo.getAnnotations()
    Returns all annotations declared on this parameter.
    <A extends Annotation>
    Stream<AnnotationInfo<A>>
    ParameterInfo.getAnnotations(Class<A> type)
    Returns a stream of annotation infos of the specified type declared on this parameter.
    List<AnnotationInfo>
    ClassInfo.getDeclaredAnnotations()
    Returns all annotations declared directly on this class, wrapped in AnnotationInfo objects.
    final List<AnnotationInfo<Annotation>>
    ExecutableInfo.getDeclaredAnnotations()
    Returns the declared annotations on this executable.
    final <A extends Annotation>
    Stream<AnnotationInfo<A>>
    ExecutableInfo.getDeclaredAnnotations(Class<A> type)
    Returns the declared annotations of the specified type on this executable.

    Field
    Description
    static final Predicate<AnnotationInfo<?>>
    RemoteUtils.REMOTE_OP_GROUP
    Predicate that can be used to filter annotation streams.

    Fields in org.apache.juneau.rest.server with type parameters of type AnnotationInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Predicate<AnnotationInfo<?>>
    RestOpAnnotation.REST_OP_GROUP
    Predicate that can be used to filter annotation streams.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server that return types with arguments of type AnnotationInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Optional<AnnotationInfo<Rest>>
    RestContext.getRestAnnotation()
    Returns the nearest Rest annotation on this resource.
    protected List<AnnotationInfo<Rest>>
    RestContext.getRestAnnotations()
    Returns all Rest annotations on the resource class hierarchy, in child-to-parent order.
    protected List<AnnotationInfo<Rest>>
    RestContext.getRestAnnotationsTopDown()
    Returns the Rest annotations for this resource in parent-to-child (top-down) order.
    List<AnnotationInfo<?>>
    RestOpContext.getRestOpAnnotations()
    Returns all RestOp-group annotations on this operation method, in child-to-parent order.
